w:r.w:t: Week 2 OVLP Grade Pre-Nursery IT Term 3.mp4
Tracing of shape (Square) and first letter.
Food of the week is Lettuce.
Circle the correct letter of pictures (leaf, necklace, parrot, ring)
Join the dots to make square shape and write 1
Pupils will be playing the game is
Join the dots to make square shape and write 1
What is the national fruit of Pakistan? Ans:
How many Eids do Muslims celebrate? Name them.
Ans: Muslims celebrate two Eids. (Eid-ul-Fitr and Eid-ul-Adha).
Tell the names of 5 pet animals.
Dog, Cat, Parrot, Fish and Rabbit.
previous work done this week is complete.
